en.text: from a compound of G0001 (as a negative particle) and G5316 (compare G1810) (meaning non-apparent); unexpected, i.e. (adverbially) suddenly

senses.gloss_en: from a compound of G0001 (as a negative particle) and G5316 (compare G1810) (meaning non-apparent); unexpected, i.e. (adverbially) suddenly
